name: 双持贝瑞塔 | 精琢孔雀石
nameZh: 双持贝瑞塔 | 精琢孔雀石
descriptionEn: Firing two large-mag Berettas at once will lower accuracy and increase load times. On the bright side, you'll get to fire two large-mag Berettas at once. These Dual Berettas have been painted with striking green and silver colors. The grips are finished with a ceramic top coat. They command respect, although I can't say the same for you... - Booth, Arms Dealer
descriptionZh: 两把具有大弹匣的贝瑞塔同时开火会降低精准度，并增加换弹时间。不过你得往好处想，这不，别人只有一把枪，而你可以同时用两把贝瑞塔射个痛快。 这把双持贝瑞塔进行了翠绿镀银涂装，握把则是陶瓷镀层。 它们值得敬畏，至于你嘛……——军火商步兹
